problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
hypothesis: If Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells is applied to spread, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
